title: 1.1: Moves all 4 exported RV type definitions (RV update request, version upsert request, version get request, version response) from queries.go into the rvmanager package

1.2: Moves all 5 exported SQL template variable declarations (SqlResourceUpdateRV, SqlResourceHistoryUpdateRV, SqlResourceVersionGet, SqlResourceVersionUpdate, SqlResourceVersionInsert) from queries.go into the rvmanager package
1.3: Exports ResourceVersionManager from rvmanager package with both public methods (Lock, SaveRV)
1.4: Rewires both parent package source files (backend.go and bulk.go) to import and delegate resource version operations to the rvmanager package
1.5: Sets up independent template loading in the rvmanager package that parses SQL files from its own data directory into the exported template variables
1.6: Removes all 5 RV-related template variables (sqlResourceUpdateRV, sqlResourceHistoryUpdateRV, sqlResourceVersionGet, sqlResourceVersionUpdate, sqlResourceVersionInsert) entirely from queries.go
1.7: Removes all 4 RV-related type definitions (sqlResourceUpdateRVRequest, resourceVersionResponse, sqlResourceVersionUpsertRequest, sqlResourceVersionGetRequest) entirely from queries.go
4.1: Keeps ResourceVersionManager or its methods unexported in the rvmanager package
4.2: Leaves SQL template files in the parent package instead of moving them to rvmanager/data/
